on proposals for revised administrative approvals.

Madam Cama Road, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
See: - 9) Finance Department, Government Resolution No. BGT - 2276/7 BUD-14, Dated: 29 "December 1976 & Corrigendum Dated: 200 February 1977
2) Department of Finance, Government Decision No. Expenditure 2022 / Q. No.120 / Budget-2, D. October 48, 2022
Revised Administrative Decision of the Department of Finance dated 19th October, 2022
The provision regarding submission for approval is as per the recommendation of the Expenditure Priorities Committee.
Improvements are being made as follows.
table_trans: Authority competent to grant revised administrative approval
Revised administrative sanction projects with a ceiling of 15% of the original administrative sanction amount or an increase in the ceiling of Rs.1 crore.
Additional Chief | Secretary / Principal Secretary / Secretary of the Administrative Division (not to be delegated at the level of the said jurisdiction)
Projects with revised administrative sanction exceeding 15% of the original administrative sanction amount but exceeding the limit of Rs.10 crore
Additional Chief Secretary / Principal Secretary / Secretary to the Administrative Department (with the concurrence of the Planning and Finance Department)
Projects with revised administrative sanction exceeding Rs.10 crore of the original administrative sanction amount

para_trans: Government Decision No: Expenditure 2026 / Q. No.14 / Budget-2
The Government decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
